text: The darkness and neon glow fill me with a sense of curiosity and slight unease. The emptiness of the room and the reflection in the glass evoke an awareness of my own presence, as if I am peering into a deep question about boundaries—between inside and outside, isolation and participation. The 'R+D' sign on the colorful wall hints at creation and progress, suggesting that even in the quiet and shadows, seeds of innovation are germinating. I feel like an observer on the brink of discovery, but unsure if I am part of the experiment or simply watching it unfold.
